overall.description: A sleek spaceship cruises through deep space with nebula clouds in the background. The vessel reconfigures its wings and engines before activating a warp drive, creating streaking light effects in this cinematic game engine sequence.

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft in a steady cruise through deep space, maintaining a side profile orientation against the starfield

entered.detail: sleek silver and red spacecraft with angular design and glowing engine sections
blue-white glowing thruster trail emitting from the rear of the ship
dense field of stars against black space with subtle nebula clouds
teal and green gaseous clouds drifting in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a side view of a sleek spaceship cruising through deep space. The vessel maintains steady flight with a blue engine trail glowing behind it, set against a backdrop of stars and distant nebula clouds.

events.description: camera rotates from side view to rear view of the spaceship
spaceship wings deploy outward and auxiliary thrusters activate with blue glow

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship as it reconfigures for high-speed travel, deploying wings and powering up additional engines

entered.detail: left wing section extending outward from the main hull with integrated thruster
right wing section extending outward from the main hull with integrated thruster
additional blue glowing engines activating on the main hull and wing tips

segments.scene_description: The camera rotates around to show the rear of the spaceship as its wings deploy outward and additional thrusters activate with a bright blue glow. The ship reconfigures from a compact cruising mode to an extended high-speed configuration.

events.description: spaceship activates warp drive, creating streaking light trails and distortion effects

agents.ego_description: engaging the warp drive for faster-than-light travel as the ship accelerates dramatically and stars streak past

entered.detail: radiating white and blue light beams streaking past the ship indicating high velocity
visual distortion and motion blur effects surrounding the ship during warp

segments.scene_description: The spaceship activates its warp drive, transforming the engine exhaust into intense white beams while the starfield stretches into radiating light streaks. The vessel accelerates into faster-than-light travel, leaving the nebula behind as space distorts around it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a sleek spaceship as it transitions from a steady cruise through deep space into a high-speed warp jump. It begins with a side view of the vessel gliding past distant nebula clouds and stars, leaving a soft blue engine trail in its wake. As the camera rotates toward the rear of the ship, the vessel reconfigures its form, deploying its wings outward and activating additional glowing thrusters. The scene then shifts as the warp drive engages, transforming the blue exhaust into intense white beams that distort the surrounding space. Finally, the starfield stretches into radiating light streaks as the ship accelerates into faster-than-light travel, leaving the nebulae behind in a blur of motion.
